goal: Build a 4-color sorter: a Franka Panda picks 4 cubes (red, blue, green, yellow) from a conveyor and routes each to its color-matching bin. Scales CP-03's 2-color sort to 4 colors. Validates color_routing dict with 4 entries.
thoughts:
Six 4-color sort specifics for CP-16 (extends CP-03 — same color_routing pattern, scaled to 4 cubes/bins/colors):
1) 4 distinctly-colored cubes (red, blue, green, yellow). Each tagged via set_semantic_label(class_name='red'|'blue'|'green'|'yellow', semantic_type='color'). Cuberobo handler's _bin_drop_pos reads cube's Semantics_color at pick time.
2) 4 bins arranged in a row behind the robot at y=-0.4. RedBin x=-0.45, BlueBin x=-0.15, GreenBin x=+0.15, YellowBin x=+0.45. Spaced 0.30m apart.
3) Bins each tinted with their corresponding color material — visual matching aids debugging.
4) color_routing dict has 4 entries: {'red':'/World/RedBin', 'blue':'/World/BlueBin', 'green':'/World/GreenBin', 'yellow':'/World/YellowBin'}.
5) All bins within Franka's 0.85m reach: max distance from robot at (0,0,0.75) to YellowBin at (+0.45, -0.4) is sqrt(0.45^2+0.4^2)=0.60m. Within reach.
6) 4 cubes start outside reach on conveyor at x=[-1.4, -1.1, -0.8, -0.5]. Belt carries them to robot one at a time.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 4 cubes with distinct color materials + semantic labels
color_specs = [
    ("/World/Cube_red",    -1.4, [1.0, 0.0, 0.0], "red"),
    ("/World/Cube_blue",   -1.1, [0.0, 0.0, 1.0], "blue"),
    ("/World/Cube_green",  -0.8, [0.0, 1.0, 0.0], "green"),
    ("/World/Cube_yellow", -0.5, [1.0, 1.0, 0.0], "yellow"),
]
for path, x, rgb, name in color_specs:
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    create_material(material_path=f"/World/Materials/{name.capitalize()}Mat", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=rgb)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=f"/World/Materials/{name.capitalize()}Mat")
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=name, semantic_type="color")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[c[0] for c in color_specs],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for c in color_specs:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=c[0], material_name="rubber")

# 4 colored bins arranged in a row at y=-0.4 (behind robot)
bin_specs = [
    ("/World/RedBin",    -0.45, "red"),
    ("/World/BlueBin",   -0.15, "blue"),
    ("/World/GreenBin",  +0.15, "green"),
    ("/World/YellowBin", +0.45, "yellow"),
]
for path, x, name in bin_specs:
    create_bin(prim_path=path, position=[x, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=f"/World/Materials/{name.capitalize()}Mat")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# cuRobo controller with 4-entry color_routing
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[c[0] for c in color_specs],
    destination_path="/World/RedBin",
    color_routing={
        "red":    "/World/RedBin",
        "blue":   "/World/BlueBin",
        "green":  "/World/GreenBin",
        "yellow": "/World/YellowBin",
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/RedBin", "/World/BlueBin", "/World/GreenBin", "/World/YellowBin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-16 scales CP-03's 2-color sort to 4-color. Same color_routing pattern, more entries. Per-cube material + semantic label per color. All 4 bins fit within 0.6m of robot base — comfortable reach. Future variants: 8-class (RGB+CMYK), size+color combinatorial, vision-gated (using add_vision_classifier_gate when render-flush is fixed).
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path={{workpieces[0].material_path}}, shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color={{workpieces[0].color_rgb}})
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[0].material_path}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[0].color_name}}, semantic_type="color")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path={{workpieces[1].material_path}}, shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color={{workpieces[1].color_rgb}})
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[1].material_path}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[1].color_name}}, semantic_type="color")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path={{workpieces[2].material_path}}, shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color={{workpieces[2].color_rgb}})
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[2].material_path}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[2].color_name}}, semantic_type="color")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path={{workpieces[3].material_path}}, shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color={{workpieces[3].color_rgb}})
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[3].material_path}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[3].color_name}}, semantic_type="color")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)

for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path={{destinations[0].path}}, position={{destinations[0].position}}, size={{destinations[0].size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{destinations[0].path}}, material_path={{destinations[0].material_path}})
create_bin(prim_path={{destinations[1].path}}, position={{destinations[1].position}}, size={{destinations[1].size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{destinations[1].path}}, material_path={{destinations[1].material_path}})
create_bin(prim_path={{destinations[2].path}}, position={{destinations[2].position}}, size={{destinations[2].size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{destinations[2].path}}, material_path={{destinations[2].material_path}})
create_bin(prim_path={{destinations[3].path}}, position={{destinations[3].position}}, size={{destinations[3].size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{destinations[3].path}}, material_path={{destinations[3].material_path}})

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{destinations[0].path}},
    color_routing={
        {{workpieces[0].color_name}}: {{destinations[0].path}},
        {{workpieces[1].color_name}}: {{destinations[1].path}},
        {{workpieces[2].color_name}}: {{destinations[2].path}},
        {{workpieces[3].color_name}}: {{destinations[3].path}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{destinations[0].path}}, {{destinations[1].path}}, {{destinations[2].path}}, {{destinations[3].path}}],
)
failure_modes: set_semantic_label class_name case mismatch with color_routing keys — both must be lowercase ('red', not 'Red'). cuRobo handler lowercases cube class_name before dict lookup but exact match preferred.
Bins overlapping reach zone — adjacent bins 0.30m apart; if robot's wrist swings during transit, may clip bin walls. cuRobo's planning_obstacles avoidance should prevent — all 4 bins included.
Color material not visually distinct in viewport — set DomeLight intensity 1000 ensures cubes lit. Without sufficient light, all cubes look gray.
Multi-color overflow (>4 cubes per color) — controller currently delivers each cube once. Scaling beyond 4 cubes requires belt re-feed loop (not in this canonical).
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (120s sim. cube_final=(-0.44, -0.39, 0.785) in Bin)
